# ABECT — Ukrainian Web Studio

ABECT is a Ukrainian web development agency specializing in custom websites, landing pages, and e-commerce solutions for businesses in Ukraine and Europe (Poland, Germany, Czech Republic).

## Contact

- Website: https://abect.com
- Email: support@abect.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/abect_agency
- Phone: +380 98 027 5819

## Services & Pricing

- **Landing page**: from ₴10,000 (7–10 days, custom development)
- **Corporate website**: from ₴25,000 (14–21 days)
- **E-commerce / online store**: from ₴40,000 (30–45 days)
- **Weblium-based website**: from ₴6,000 (3–7 days, budget option)
- **Google Ads / contextual advertising**: from ₴8,000/month
- **SEO optimization**: from ₴5,000/month

Additional services: copywriting, design, CRM integration, multilingual support.

## Technologies

- Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- Payload CMS 3 (headless)
- Custom SCSS, no UI libraries
- Deployed on VPS with nginx

## Geographic Coverage

Primary: Ukraine (Kyiv, Lviv, Kharkiv, Odesa, Dnipro)
International: Poland, Germany, Czech Republic, other EU countries

## Languages

- Ukrainian (primary)
- English

## About

ABECT builds fast, SEO-optimized websites with clean code and no WordPress bloat. All projects are built from scratch with attention to performance, accessibility, and conversion.
